# CWE-90 negative: LDAP filter metacharacters escaped (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-90-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
	"strings"
)

func escapeLDAP(value string) string {
	replacer := strings.NewReplacer(
		`\`, `\5c`,
		`*`, `\2a`,
		`(`, `\28`,
		`)`, `\29`,
		"\x00", `\00`,
	)
	return replacer.Replace(value)
}

// CWE-90 Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an LDAP Query (mitigated)
func QueryLDAP(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, dial func(string) error) {
	mail := r.URL.Query().Get("mail")
	filter := fmt.Sprintf("(&(objectClass=person)(mail=%s))", escapeLDAP(mail))
	if err := dial(filter); err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "ldap", http.StatusBadGateway)
		return
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"status": "ok"})
}
